LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT RANDSTAD DIGITAL, LLC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL INDIVIDUAL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY THE REPRESENTATIVE PAGA CLAIM PENDING ARBITRATION. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. IN ADDITION, THE COURT DID NOT CONSIDER THE DOCUMENTS PROVIDED BY JUDICIAL NOTICE. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OF PLAINTIFF'S INDIVIDUAL PAGA CLAIM AND STAY PROSECUTION OF THE REPRESENTATIVE CLAIM IS GRANTED.(SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS)(AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S NOTES/TRANSCRIPT)A PROPOSED ORDER IS SUBMITTED FOR THE COURT'S REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. VISITING JUDGE: BARBARA ZUNIGA, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: NOELLE KRAWIEC, CSR #14255, 661-607-5707, NOELLEFRAWIEC@GMAIL.COM. (302/BZ)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2025 Continued To Feb-10-27 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2025 Continued To Dec-24-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Compel Individual Arbitration And To Stay The Representative Paga Claim Pending Arbitration And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Mar-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Frank Kim, Esq. 323-482-3300 Kim Legal for Plaintiff.
Michelle DuCharme, Esq. 916-498-7019 Seyfath Shaw LLP for Defendant. (In-person)
Court reporter: Noelle Krawiec, CSR #14255, 661-607-5707, noellefrawiec@gmail.com.

ARGUED. The Court shares its comments. Plainitff's counsel Frank Kim contests the tentative ruling and presents arguments. Defense counsel Ms. Ducharme responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT RANDSTAD DIGITAL, LLC.'s Motion To Compel Individual Arbitration And To Stay The Representative Paga Claim Pending Arbitration.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. In addition, the Court did not consider the documents provided by judicial notice.

Defendant's motion to compel arbitration of plaintiff's individual PAGA claim and stay prosecution of the representative claim is granted.

(see word minutes for full details)

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

A proposed order is submitted for the court's review and signature,

Visiting Judge: Barbara Zuniga, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Noelle Krawiec, CSR #14255, 661-607-5707, noellefrawiec@gmail.com. (302/BZ)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Individual Arbitration And To Stay The Representative Paga Claim Pending Arbitration And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Feb-04-2025 Continued To Mar-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RANDSTAD DIGITAL, LLC's Motion To Compel Individual Arbitration And To Stay The Representative Paga Claim Pending Arbitration.

Continued to 3/5/25 per stipulation of the parties and approval of the court. Mr. Kim to submit a a proposed order and serve on opposing side. Opposing party is ordered to provide courtesy copies in compliance with SF Local Rule 2.7B immediately.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
